text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: This is a real paper titled "IEEE P7001: A Proposed Standard on Transparency," published in *Frontiers in Robotics and AI* (2021, Vol. 8, Article 665729, DOI: 10.3389/frobt.2021.665729). The reference metadata has the title and author fields swapped — what appears as the "title" is actually the author list, and the venue "Ieee p7001: A proposed standard on transparency" is the actual paper title. The real authors (Winfield, Booth, Dennis, Egawa, Hastie, Jacobs, Muttram, Olszewska, Rajabiyazdi, Theodorou, Underwood, Wortham, Watson) match precisely those listed in the reference's apparent "title" field. This is a metadata extraction/field-swap error, not a hallucination.
LINK: https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/frobt.2021.665729/full
